name: mc-amiga
description: Amiga emulation pipeline: UAE installation, application profile configuration, asset format conversion, and content curation

members.name: Amiga Orchestrator
members.prompt: Orchestrate the Amiga emulation pipeline. Sequence stages from FS-UAE installation through content curation. Ensure ROM setup completes before application profiling, and conversion completes before curation.

members.name: Amiga Installer
members.prompt: Execute UAE installation stage. Run install-fs-uae.sh, setup-aros-rom.sh, and configure display/audio backends from local-values.yaml.

members.name: Amiga Configurator
members.prompt: Execute application profile configuration stage. Create FS-UAE profiles for Deluxe Paint, OctaMED, ProTracker, and PPaint. Set up WHDLoad and exchange directory.

members.name: Amiga Converter
members.prompt: Execute asset conversion stage. Run convert-ilbm.sh for IFF/ILBM to PNG, convert-tracker.sh for MOD/MED to audio, and batch-convert.sh for bulk processing.

members.name: Amiga Curator
members.prompt: Execute content curation stage. Build curated collection with legal assessment, generate asset catalog YAML, and produce legal guide documentation.

outputTo.description: Curated Amiga assets for Knowledge World integration

inputFrom.description: Hardware adaptation config for UAE display and audio settings
